name: rulesets
description: A CommonMark-compliant rules compiler that lets you author a single source rules file in Markdown and compile it into destination-specific rules files
author: Matt Galligan <matt.galligan@gmail.com>

scripts.format: bun x ultracite@latest format && prettier --write "**/*.{json,yaml,yml}" && markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.{md,mdx,mdc}"
scripts.format:check:all: bun x ultracite@latest lint && prettier --check "**/*.{json,yaml,yml}" && markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.{md,mdx,mdc}" && (stylelint "**/*.css" || echo 'No CSS files found')
scripts.lint: bun x ultracite@latest lint && markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.{md,mdx,mdc}" && (find . -name "*.css" -type f | head -1 > /dev/null && stylelint "**/*.css" || echo 'No CSS files found - skipping CSS lint')
scripts.lint:fix: bun x ultracite@latest format && prettier --write "**/*.{json,yaml,yml}" && markdownlint-cli2 --fix "**/*.{md,mdx,mdc}" && (stylelint --fix "**/*.css" || echo 'No CSS files found')
scripts.ci: bun scripts/build.ts && bun scripts/test.ts && bun scripts/typecheck.ts
scripts.clean:all: bun run clean && bun run --filter '*' clean
scripts.sandbox:clean: cd apps/sandbox && bun run start clean
scripts.update-lockfile: sed -i '' 's/frozenLockfile = true/frozenLockfile = false/' bunfig.toml && bun install && sed -i '' 's/frozenLockfile = false/frozenLockfile = true/' bunfig.toml
